contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Hit-List state-machine diagnosis + autopilot self-improvement (3 PRs + 2 prod redeploys)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/19
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/21
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/22
  
  Details:
  Diagnosed Hit-List "warm-up dead-end" bug as a state-machine gap (HIT_LIST_STATE_MACHINE.md line 62 explicitly says rows stay in Warm-up forever with no reply, leaving 26 stores over-warmed and 7 replied-but-untouched). Confirmed oracle's pipeline complaint was grounded in real ADVISORY_SNAPSHOT data, not hallucination.
  
  Spun up local autopilot on port 8011 to drive the fixes. The autopilot opened the substantive PRs and merged them; surfaced two latent bugs in deploy_autopilot itself (paramiko never imported; SSH config aliases not resolved) which were fixed by hand because the local autopilot session kept dying mid-task.
  
  Production redeployed twice via direct SSH (since deploy_autopilot itself was the thing being fixed). Prod now at c370298, systemd active.
  
  Shipped:
  - truesight_autopilot#19 (allowlist: add go_to_market)
  - truesight_autopilot#21 (chat: default draft PRs + raise tool-round cap 5 to 15, env-overridable)
  - truesight_autopilot#22 (deploy: import paramiko + honor ~/.ssh/config aliases)
  - agentic_ai_context#103 closed as superseded (will be redone with full doc by next agent)
  
  Handoff prompt prepared at /tmp/opencode_handoff_prompt.md for DeepSeek/OpenCode to take the actual go_to_market warmup-aged-out PR and full HIT_LIST_STATE_MACHINE doc rewrite. WebSocket /chat upgrade deferred per Gary.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
